_comment: Pinned compatible versions of upstream tools that `wp setup --bundle` installs. Each agent-kit release runs the bundle smoke CI (Blueprint Task 3.3) against the pinned versions before declaring the agent-kit version stable. Renovate-bot watches upstream releases and proposes pin bumps; agent-kit maintainer merges after smoke CI passes against the new range.

context_mode._comment: Claude Code marketplace plugin name (used by `claude plugin install`). Version range follows the upstream release cadence; PR CI smoke-tests the lower bound of the range on a clean container.
context_mode._range_note: TBD when v1.0 alpha builds out: set to the lowest context-mode version that supports the ctx_batch_execute API contract agent-kit relies on.

rtk._comment: Rust Token Killer (https://github.com/reachingforthejack/rtk-rust). Distributed as a binary; install via `brew install rtk` on macOS or `cargo install rtk` cross-platform.
rtk._range_note: TBD when v1.0 alpha builds out: set to the rtk version verified by smoke CI against agent-kit's hook chain.

_intentionally_not_pinned.gstack: Lane 4: agent-kit does not redistribute Garry Tan's gstack. The gstack scaffolder clones the upstream main branch and runs `./setup --team`. No version pin because gstack is not a versioned package — it's a skill registry consumed at HEAD. See `catalog/agent/rules/gstack-routing.md` (Blueprint Task 0.4).
